AffiliateLink.title: Affiliate Link
AffiliateLink.description: An affiliate or referral link to be managed and listed.

userId.description: The UID of the owner who created this link

title.description: The name or title of the referral program

description.description: Short description of what the link is about

category.description: Category e.g. Tech, SaaS, Shopping, Travel, Finance

discountCode.description: Optional promo code or coupon code for users

rewardText.description: Describe what reward the clicking guest gets, e.g. 10% discount

ownerRewardText.description: Describe what you receive, e.g. 15% recurring commission

slug.description: Custom neat ending for the tracking link

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Profile information of the link directory owner.

displayName.description: Name or brand to display at the top of the directory

bio.description: Short bio or tagline to introduce their links

/affiliateLinks/{linkId}.description: Collection of public affiliate and referral links.
